response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across stacks and domains, aligning well with the role’s technical demands; however, his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and there is limited evidence of executive-level leadership, architectural oversight of client projects, or direct experience in IT consulting or digital sovereignty — key pillars of the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js, DLang), and modern architectures
Strong mentorship and workshop experience demonstrating knowledge sharing and team leadership
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of the required C1 level
Lacks clear evidence of client-facing architectural advisory or IT consulting experience
No demonstrated experience in requirements management, UML modeling, or compliance/risk frameworks
